# Mikhail Semenov — AI Product Manager

AI Product Manager at Prof-IT. I lead voice AI agents for B2B (zvonobot, effebot, p1sms)
and ship products end-to-end with AI coding agents (Claude Code, Codex), validating
hypotheses in days, not sprints. In 2026 the voice AI product I lead has handled
500,000+ minutes of new-customer conversations.

## Role and focus
- Title: AI Product Manager
- Company: Prof-IT (since early 2022)
- Current focus: voice AI agents for B2B; AI embedded into real workflows
- Open to: AI Product Manager roles where the product grows through thoughtful AI adoption
- Languages: Russian (native), English (working proficiency, comfortable in written and async)
- Work format: remote, GMT+5, open to relocation

## Canonical site
- https://rebsem.ru/

## Main pages
- Home: https://rebsem.ru/
- About: https://rebsem.ru/about
- Blog: https://rebsem.ru/blog

## Selected work
- Zvonobot AI: voice AI-agent platform for B2B (Prof-IT), launched in 2026 and run end-to-end (product, UX, engineering). Multi-tenant SaaS console over telephony infrastructure. Case: https://rebsem.ru/projects/zvonobot-ai-en/
- cursivo: AI-powered CRM for car rental, led from product logic to release. https://cursivo.xyz
- obrabot: internal voice AI analytics dashboard (Prof-IT)
- Pet projects shipped in 1–7 days with AI agents (bazabot, Zodial, Slopiq, tubedrop, portfo)

## Skills
Product: product discovery, product strategy, roadmap, metrics and unit economics, CustDev, B2B SaaS, go-to-market.
AI / LLM: voice AI agents, conversational AI, LLM orchestration, prompt engineering, RAG, AI in real workflows.
Delivery: spec to review to ship, agent-native development (Claude Code, Codex), Lean Startup, 0 to 1, fast hypothesis validation.
Tech (shared language with engineers): React/Next.js, TypeScript, Python/Flask, PostgreSQL/Redis, REST and integrations, telephony.

## Content notes
- Blog and project cases are published in RU and EN.
- This site is open source (Astro): https://github.com/RebSem/portfo
